title: Idex (IEX) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Idex (IEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.32% and 3.84%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: IDEX Reports Strong Second Quarter Results
text: NORTHBROOK, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IDEX Corporation (NYSE: IEX) today announced its financial results for the three month period ended June 30, 2022. "IDEX delivered outstanding results in the second quarter, closing out a record first half of the year," said Eric D. Ashleman, IDEX Corporation Chief Executive Officer and President.
